complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**运行自动编程** 按钮旁还有 **自动训练** 复选框；它与编程完成后的拼板: Next to the **Run auto programming** button there is also an **Auto-train after programming** checkbox; for what it does — together with the panel building and model training that run automatically after programming — see **Post-programming automation: panel building and model training** below.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**编程后的自动处理：拼板构建与模型训练**: **Post-programming automation: panel building and model training**
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.点击 **运行自动编程** 后，除生成检测框外，系统还会根据两个相互独立的选项自: After you click **Run auto programming**, the system not only generates the detection boxes but also automatically carries out follow-up steps, governed by two independent options. Throughout the process the screen stays locked and shows a processing status (for example, "Building panel array…") until everything is finished; no action is needed in the meantime.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**自动构建拼板阵列** — 若在自动编程配置的 **拼板** 面板中开启了 *: **Automatic panel-array building** — if **Enable panelization** is turned on in the **Panelization** panel of the auto-program configuration and **Num of Rows** / **Num of Cols** are greater than 1, then after programming finishes the system automatically registers the base sub-board from the drawn detection region, auto-detects the positions of the remaining sub-boards, and runs auto-adjust to align the array. This replaces the "Manage Base Panel → Auto-Detect → Auto-Adjust Panel" steps that previously had to be done by hand on the :ref:`PCB 拼板` page.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.启用拼板时，自动编程检测区域必须绘制在 **单个代表性子板** 周围，而非整块拼: When panelization is enabled, the auto-program detection region must be drawn around **a single representative sub-board**, not the whole panel. The configuration screen gives the same reminder. The system uses that region as the template for a single sub-board to detect the others; if you frame the whole panel, only one sub-board can be detected.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.若自动检测在尝试次数内未能匹配设定的行 × 列，系统会弹出警告，产品保留为 **: If automatic detection cannot match the configured rows × cols within the trial limit, the system shows a warning, keeps the product as a **single board** without registering a panel array, and then continues according to the **Auto-train after programming** setting. You can then panelize manually on the :ref:`PCB 拼板` page.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**自动训练模型** — 由 **运行自动编程** 按钮旁的 **自动训练**: **Automatic model training** — controlled by the **Auto-train after programming** checkbox next to the **Run auto programming** button (checked by default; the choice is remembered). When checked, once programming (and panel building) finish the system automatically runs model training, detection-parameter generation, and re-evaluation in turn, with no manual trigger; when unchecked it skips training, which you can run later by hand on the product-programming page. This option is independent of panelization — checked means train, whether or not the product is panelized.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**拼板自动检测失败**：自动编程时若提示自动拼板检测未匹配设定的行 × 列，产: **Automatic panel detection failed**: if, during auto-programming, you are told that automatic panel detection did not match the configured rows × cols, the product is kept as a single board. Confirm that the detection region frames only a single representative sub-board (not the whole panel) and retry; if it still fails, you can panelize manually on the :ref:`PCB 拼板` page.

complete_user_guide/features/pcb_array.p.本页描述的\"管理子板模板 → 自动检测 → 自动调整拼板\"流程也可在创建产品: The "Manage Base Panel → Auto-Detect → Auto-Adjust Panel" workflow described on this page can also be done automatically when creating a product: turn on **Enable panelization** in the :ref:`自动编程` configuration and fill in the rows / cols, and the system will build the panel array automatically after auto-programming finishes. This page's workflow is for manual paneling, or as a fallback after automatic detection fails.
